user_query: I'm planning a beach wedding and I need some inspiration for the decorations and setup. Can you find images of beach weddings with beautiful floral arrangements and unique ceremony setups? Additionally, I would like to watch YouTube videos about wedding planning tips and beach wedding ideas. Please provide me with a selection of stunning images and the top YouTube videos for planning my dream beach wedding.

TaskList.description: Search for high-quality images of beach weddings focusing on floral arrangements and ceremony setups.
required_inputs: keywords: beach wedding, floral arrangements, ceremony setup

TaskList.description: Collect top YouTube videos related to wedding planning tips and beach wedding ideas.
required_inputs: keywords: wedding planning tips, beach wedding ideas
